features.newsWeatherDesc: Stay updated with news and weather

whatIsAI.title: What is Artificial Intelligence (AI)?
whatIsAI.intro: AI is like a very smart helper that lives inside your phone or computer.
points: It can understand what you say or type.
It can answer your questions like a knowledgeable friend.
It can help you with everyday tasks like sending messages.
It learns from millions of books and conversations.
It is safe, helpful, and always available.
whatIsAI.examples: Examples of AI in daily life:
exampleList: Asking your phone for the weather
Getting health advice from a medical app
Reading news out loud for you

voice.title: Voice Helper
voice.instruction: Press the button and speak your question
voice.notSupported: Voice is not supported in your browser. Please try typing your question below.

chat.title: Ask Questions
chat.greeting: Namaste! I am AI Saathi. How can I help you today?
suggestionList: What are good foods for seniors?

diet: Drink 8 glasses of water every day
Eat fruits and vegetables with every meal
Reduce salt and sugar in your food
Have small meals 4-5 times a day
Include dals, beans and green leafy vegetables
exercise: Do light stretching after waking up
Yoga for 20 minutes helps joints stay flexible
Swimming is gentle on joints and good for heart
Simple chair exercises if you cannot walk much
sleep: Avoid tea or coffee after 5 PM
Keep your bedroom cool and dark
A warm glass of milk before bed helps
mental: Talk to family and friends every day
Read books, newspapers to keep mind active
Learn something new - even a small thing
Play indoor games like chess or card games
